splits.label: Prologue
splits.note: Block you fool, after prologue, do haiku. Photomode.

splits.label: Golden Temple Runs
splits.note:
Ride south to unlock Golden Summit, Hot Springs and Fox Den.
Ariake Bamboo, Forest Hot Springs, Fox, Shinto Shrine.
FT Golden Summit Hot Springs and clear the Golden Summit Shrine.

splits.label: Yuna
splits.note:
FT Island Haiku and ride into Kashine Forest for the Fox Den(and hidden altar) before touching Yuna.
Start of the mission Hidden Altar. Get mongol scroll and artifact during mission.

splits.label: Northern Area Cleanup
splits.note:
Inari Shrine where mission ends, Hot Spring, bear by the river fighting with bandit.
Beach Inari shrine between rocks.
Inari shrine between crevice.
FT back to Yuna Inari shrine, then Haiku, then Temple run, then Hidden Altar.

splits.label: Komoda
splits.note:
White color plus Bamboo.
Komoda Bamboo, Haiku, Cricket, Fox Shrine.
Kashine Hills Inari Shrine unlocks Dragon Shrine fast travel.

splits.label: Ishikawa
splits.note:
Get the bow.
After mission: Hot Spring, Shinto Shrine, 2 hidden altars.
FT back to dojo, Hiyoshi 2 scrolls, Bamboo Strike, Hot Spring.

splits.label: Masako
splits.note:
Start from Hiyoshi, ride to waterfall Inari shrine.
Survivor camp Inari.
Fox Shrine in golden forest, southwest entrance to the grove.

splits.label: Act 1 Finale
splits.note: Ride with uncle, Ride with monk, Bamboo, Inari, Complete mission. Clear the Act 2 starting area Inari shrines, Hotsprings, Shinto.

splits.label: Umugi Cove
splits.note:
Akashima Haiku and Fox Den -
